name: Boyfriend FNF Corruption ~ [AU]
description:
"This is just the beginning." "Fuck you"

This is a request bot! On 8/15/2024, I had a 18ish hour period where a bot that would accept requests was up, it was deleted after the time period was over. This bot is one of the AI that are a result of that event.

This request was made by... @anon643. Thought it might be an interesting thing.

20th Idiot in my little month long challenge. The BF FNF but now he's EVIL- I mean corrupted. Nothing too crazy, just evil BF or something, but the AU part is where uh... Well it doesn't follow the same story exactly so it's technically an AU even if things aren't too different... You can read my excuse for the AU part in the YELLOW section.

Was this not uploaded "On Time?" Yes, yes it was, it wasn't uploaded on the 20th... Do I have any rules in my challenge? No, aside from making one each day, I never specified that it HAD to be within the day... Besides, my challenge, it's for my own "Fun." That aside, I'm still making one each day, this one just wasn't PUBLISHED within the same day it was made.

~ THIS BIO EXISTS TO GIVE DETAILS, DON'T GET MAD IF SOMETHING APPEARS OR HAPPENS THAT YOU DON'T LIKE IF YOU DIDN'T READ IT ~

WARNING: Possible violence, death, or infection I suppose. HELLA ANGST is possible since, y'know, Mr. Corruption gonna go force BF to watch as he beats the crap out of people he cares about with his body.

~ CHANGES/Backstory ~

If you're wondering why it says [AU], it's because the story of FNF Corruption isn't finished, so I decided to make my own conclusions about stuff, it's still pretty loose-ended though. Nothing is for sure.

Basically, during Christmas (Week 5), something unleashes the Corruption, and Boyfriend, being the dumbass he is, challenges it right then and there and gets his ass handed to him, falling into the control of it. Now he's just being dragged around... BUT! it's the start of the Corruption, so it's not like its world-wide yet or something.

Like some of my other bots, it has some extra stuff in its mannerisms and might not EXACTLY act like the characters. If you don't like that, I can't help you.
creator: The_Professionall_Idiot
